_description: Generic defaults for any OpenAI-compatible model. Works out of the box with llama.cpp, vLLM, Ollama, OpenAI, or any server that speaks the /v1/chat/completions API. Conservative settings that prioritize reliability over speed.

dynamic_temperature._comment: On retry, temp = max(floor, base_temp * decay^attempt). Reduces randomness for structured output.

tool_call_batching.system_prompt_suffix: When multiple tools are needed, call ALL of them in a single response. Do not call one tool and wait - emit all tool calls together.
tool_call_batching._comment: Reduces round-trips by encouraging multi-tool emission in one turn.

speculative_decoding._comment: Enable and configure a draft model for 2-3x speedup. Requires a small model from the same family.

server_optimization._comment: Generic defaults with no hardware-specific optimizations. Override per your GPU/CPU setup.

running_config.description: Generic OpenAI-compatible server. Point TARGET_URL to your inference server.

llm_server.vram_estimate: Depends on model size and quantization
